analysis: In the last iteration, Agents 0 and 1 encountered syntax errors, while Agent 2 had a valid but simple heuristic approach. Agent 3 failed to receive an LLM response. We need to refine the genetic and simulated annealing approaches (exploit) and explore a new local search method combined with tabu search.

assignments.direction: Refine the genetic algorithm by improving the mutation and crossover operations, focusing on better exploration and exploitation strategies.
Enhance the simulated annealing approach by optimizing the cooling rate and initial temperature settings to improve convergence and solution quality.
Implement a new local search method combined with tabu search to explore the search space more effectively and test its performance on various job scheduling instances.
Develop a new heuristic-based approach, such as the Shortest Remaining Processing Time (SRPT) rule, to minimize total tardiness and evaluate its performance across different instance sizes.
